level.setting: A forgotten, underground crypt beneath a frozen wasteland

pickup.name: Oil Flask
pickup.effect: Increases fire damage by 2x when applied to an enemy

encounters.trigger: Burning the ghoul clears the obstruction to the hallway

encounters.hazard: Freezing mist that drains health slowly

pickup.name: Ancient Sunstone
pickup.effect: Allows the player to bypass the boss's shadow shield

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentinel opens the heavy iron gate to the Inner Sanctum

pickup.name: Alchemical Catalyst
pickup.effect: Turns fire spells into blue hellfire that ignores armor

encounters.trigger: Killing the creeper summons the boss from the sarcophagus

boss.name: Lich King of Embers
boss.victory_condition: Reduce health to zero while holding the Ancient Sunstone

level.objective: Purge the corruption from the Sunken Crypt.

enemy.name: Grumpy Toadstool
enemy.weakness: The sonic frequency of the Enchanted Whistle

pickup.name: Honey-Glazed Nut
pickup.effect: Attracts woodland creatures

encounters.trigger: Defeating the toadstool causes a vine bridge to lower, granting access to the Singing Stream.

enemy.name: Bubble Golem
enemy.weakness: The Honey-Glazed Nut disrupts its focus

pickup.name: Sparkling Dewdrop
pickup.effect: Reflects blinding light

encounters.trigger: The Golem bursts into bubbles, revealing a hidden path to the Crystal Cave.

enemy.name: Mirror Bat
enemy.weakness: The Sparkling Dewdrop creates a blinding glare

pickup.name: Ancient Seed
pickup.effect: Rapidly grows giant vines

encounters.trigger: The bat retreats into the darkness, opening the gate to the Throne of Thistles.

boss.name: Sprite King
boss.victory_condition: Use the Ancient Seed to trap the King in vines, then call him down to talk.

level.objective: Retrieve the Golden Acorn from the mischievous Sprite King to restore magic to the Whispering Woods.

level.setting: A desolated, gothic cathedral suspended in a void dimension

pickup.name: Phial of Sun-Oil
pickup.effect: Coats weapon to illuminate dark enemies

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker opens the heavy iron gates to the Nave.

pickup.name: Holy Relic Fragment
pickup.effect: Dispels magical armor plating

encounters.trigger: Clearing the Sentinel causes the altar to reveal the stairway to the Sanctum.

pickup.name: Crystal of Light
pickup.effect: Blinds boss momentarily

encounters.trigger: Slaying the Warlock breaks the seal on the inner Sanctum door.

boss.name: Shadow Archon
boss.victory_condition: Reduce boss health to zero while using the Crystal of Light to reveal its physical form.

level.objective: Purify the Corrupted Cathedral and banish the Shadow Archon.

pickup.name: Echoing Chime
pickup.effect: Reveals invisible paths and enemy weak points

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Shade Sentinel shatters its armor, revealing a hidden passage to the Archive of Sighs.

pickup.name: Essence of Clarity
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to mental manipulation

encounters.trigger: The Librarian's dying gasp unlocks the sealing runes on the upper Sanctum door.

pickup.name: Mirror Shard
pickup.effect: Reflects magical attacks back at the caster

encounters.trigger: The Assassin disintegrates, leaving behind the key to the Inner Chamber boss arena.

boss.name: Grand Illusionist Malakor
boss.victory_condition: Destroy the Mirror of False Truths using the Mirror Shard to force Malakor into physical vulnerability.

level.objective: Infiltrate the Void Spire and shatter the Mirror of False Truths to break the infinite loop of the Illusionist's Curse.

pickup.name: Moonlight Dew
pickup.effect: Restores 20 health and adds a light aura

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sprite opens the path to the Crystal Pond.

pickup.name: Ancient Sunstone
pickup.effect: Allows the user to banish shadows

encounters.trigger: Clearing the pond allows the water to flow toward the Elder Oak.

pickup.name: Sacred Amber
pickup.effect: Empowers staff attacks against the Blight Lord

encounters.trigger: The Creeper dissipates, revealing the portal to the Heart of the Woods.

boss.name: Blight Lord
boss.victory_condition: Purify the Blight Lord using the Sacred Amber

level.objective: Cleanse the Whispering Glade of the encroaching blight to restore the forest's song.

level.setting: Floating ruins of an ancient celestial kingdom

pickup.name: Essence of Pure Gravity
pickup.effect: Allows the player to ground themselves against magical displacement

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel opens the path to the Burning Spire

pickup.name: Crystalized Time-Shard
pickup.effect: Slows enemy projectiles and attack speed by 50%

encounters.trigger: The Golem's death shatters the barrier to the Void Sanctuary

pickup.name: Celestial Anchor Key
pickup.effect: Nullifies the boss's invulnerability shield

encounters.trigger: Banishing the Specter unlocks the heart of the sanctuary for the final battle

boss.name: God-Breaker Titan
boss.victory_condition: Reduce boss health to zero while the Celestial Anchor Key is active

level.objective: Slay the God-Breaker Titan before the world collapses into the void.

level.setting: An ancient, crumbling crypt buried beneath a haunted forest

encounters.hazard: Grasping skeletal hands from the floor

pickup.name: Vial of Ectoplasm
pickup.effect: Temporarily grants necrotic resistance

encounters.trigger: Defeating the warden opens the heavy iron gate leading to the Charnel Hall

encounters.hazard: Thick, suffocating fog that drains stamina

pickup.name: Runed Seal of Binding
pickup.effect: Can bind ethereal spirits to physical forms

encounters.trigger: Shattering the knight's armor reveals the stairs descending into the Sunken Tomb

encounters.hazard: Sonic screams that stun the player

pickup.name: King's Signet Ring
pickup.effect: Increases damage against royal undead

encounters.trigger: Silencing the banshee dispels the barrier guarding the inner Sanctum

boss.name: The Forgotten King
boss.victory_condition: Seal the King's soul back into the sarcophagus

level.objective: Retrieve the Soul of the Forgotten King from the Crypt of Sighs

level.setting: The desolated, cursed kingdom of Aethelgard

enemy.name: Bone Construct
enemy.weakness: Direct impact from the Cursed Longbow

encounters.hazard: Crumbling stone floor that deals 10 damage if stepped on.

pickup.name: Vial of Holy Resin
pickup.effect: Coats arrows to deal extra damage to incorporeal enemies.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the construct opens the path to the Blighted Grove.

enemy.name: Spectral Stalker
enemy.weakness: Arrows coated with the Vial of Holy Resin

encounters.hazard: Toxic spores that drain 5 health per second.

pickup.name: Ancient Sunstone
pickup.effect: Emits a blinding light that stuns darkness-aligned creatures.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker reveals the entrance to the Forbidden Crypt.

enemy.name: Shadow Knight
enemy.weakness: Staggered by the Ancient Sunstone's light

encounters.hazard: Freezing mist that slows player movement speed.

pickup.name: Void Crystal
pickup.effect: Negates the protective shield of the Void Stalker boss.

encounters.trigger: Slaying the Shadow Knight unlocks the seal to the boss chamber.

level.objective: Traverse the Ashen Wastes and slay the Void Stalker to lift the curse from the ranger's homeland.

encounters.hazard: Ventilating steam pipes blocking the path

pickup.name: Cryo-Coolant Canister
pickup.effect: Freezes mechanical joints

encounters.trigger: Defeating the drone deactivates the ventilation seal leading to the Server Room.

pickup.name: High-Voltage Capacitor
pickup.effect: Overloads electronic logic boards

encounters.trigger: Extracting the Sentinel's core overrides the lockdown doors to the Reactor Chamber.

pickup.name: Core Bypass Key
pickup.effect: Stabilizes the final reactor containment field

encounters.trigger: Short-circuiting the Combat Unit disables the final barrier protecting the Reactor Boss.

boss.name: Reactor Core Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Stabilize the core using the collected items

level.objective: Repair the core reactor before the space station implodes.
level.reward: Station Commander Access Card and Advanced Engineering Schematic

level.theme: Abandoned space station rotting in deep space

pickup.name: Stasis Battery
pickup.effect: Freezes enemies in place for 3 seconds

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers a lockdown of the main bay doors, forcing the player to use a ventilation shaft that leads to the Engineering Hub.

pickup.name: Entropy Stabilizer
pickup.effect: Nullifies temporal distortions and provides a shield boost

encounters.trigger: Defeating the automaton opens the security override panel, granting access to the Reactor Core.

pickup.name: Chronos Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the main interface console for the final boss room

encounters.trigger: Killing the Guardian causes the bridge to the Central Core to materialize.

boss.name: The Fractured AI Overseer
boss.victory_condition: Input the override sequence while the boss is vulnerable

level.objective: Restore the Chronos Core to jump-start the station's life support systems before the oxygen depletion timer hits zero.

level.setting: A decaying orbital space station spinning out of control

encounters.hazard: Ventilation blades rotating at high speed

pickup.name: Liquid Nitrogen Canister
pickup.effect: Freezes mechanical joints on contact

encounters.trigger: Destroying the droid causes a surge that unlocks the Heavy Maintenance Bay door

pickup.name: Overclocked Battery Core
pickup.effect: Doubles electrical discharge range and damage

encounters.trigger: Defeating the brute destabilizes the containment field for the reactor room

pickup.name: Access Keycard
pickup.effect: Used to bypass the boss room security firewall

encounters.trigger: Eliminating the assassin initiates the final lockdown release for the reactor

boss.name: Aegis Prime AI Construct
boss.weakness: Must be frozen by the Liquid Nitrogen Canister before the Overclocked Battery Core can short-circuit its core
boss.victory_condition: Input the Access Keycard into the core to overload the AI

level.objective: Overload the central reactor to purge the rogue AI construct

level.theme: Industrial decay and advanced alien technology
level.setting: A forgotten interstellar research station drifting in the Void Sector

pickup.name: Conductive Battery Pack
pickup.effect: Grants shock damage to attacks

encounters.trigger: Defeating the drone unlocks the security gate to the Data Archive.

pickup.name: Encoded Keycard
pickup.effect: Accesses the Central Reactor Core

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the keycard initiates the containment override sequence.

pickup.name: Reactor Stabilizer Core
pickup.effect: Grants ability to neutralize energy shields

encounters.trigger: Stabilizing the core reveals the main boss chamber.

level.objective: Repair the ancient beacon and escape the derelict station.

level.setting: A decaying, abandoned space station orbiting a dying star

encounters.hazard: Depressurizing airlocks that pull the player towards the void

pickup.name: Cryo-Grenade Module
pickup.effect: Freezes mechanical joints and inhibits enemy cybernetic healing

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the containment grid opens the blast door to the Arboretum

encounters.hazard: Corrosive spores that drain health over time

pickup.name: Thermal Overdrive Key
pickup.effect: Allows the user to overload electronic locks and overheat shielded targets

encounters.trigger: Removing the flora obstruction grants access to the Reactor Core

encounters.hazard: Periodic electrical discharges from exposed cables

pickup.name: Void Resonance Amplifier
pickup.effect: Magnifies damage against phased entities and bosses

encounters.trigger: Overloading the core terminal initiates the override sequence for the final boss chamber

boss.name: Singularity Construct
boss.victory_condition: Stabilize the core by shattering the construct's outer shielding

level.objective: Infiltrate the derelict orbital station and recover the unstable singularity core before the containment field collapses.
level.reward: The Singularity Core and access to the Shadowblade's ultimate cloaking array

level.setting: A decaying, abandoned space station orbiting a dying star

pickup.name: Catalyst Vial
pickup.effect: Increases chemical reaction speed upon impact

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the drone unlocks the security gate to the Maintenance Shaft.

pickup.name: Hyper-Conductive Salt
pickup.effect: Ionizes organic matter for heavy damage

encounters.trigger: The crawler's death triggers the ventilation override to the Reactor Core.

pickup.name: Master Override Key
pickup.effect: Disables the central reactor shield

encounters.trigger: Destroying the sentinel grants access to the main reactor room for the final confrontation.

boss.name: The Sentient Reactor Core
boss.victory_condition: Inject the Master Override Key while the core is destabilized

level.objective: Purify the bio-reactor core at the heart of the derelict station before the radiation leak consumes the sector.
level.reward: Stabilized Station Core and Ancient Alchemical Manuscript

pickup.name: Sticky Honey Goo
pickup.effect: Slows down mechanical enemies

encounters.trigger: Defeating the bot activates the magnetic lift to the main floor

pickup.name: Super-Sized Spring
pickup.effect: High jump capability

encounters.trigger: Clearing the sentry unlocks the ventilation shaft leading to the boss chamber

pickup.name: Golden Keycard
pickup.effect: Used to power down the final security lock

encounters.trigger: Surviving the Jack-in-the-Box opens the heavy blast doors to the Emperor Toy Bot

level.objective: Retrieve the Galaxy's Lost Rubber Duckie from the malfunctioning toy factory

level.theme: Serene sci-fi aesthetic with marble, glowing crystals, and deep space vistas
level.setting: An ancient, floating geomantic research station drifting in the void of a silent nebula

pickup.name: Phase Shifter Module
pickup.effect: Allows teleportation through solid matter

encounters.trigger: Defeating the golem causes the cavern ceiling to collapse, unlocking the entrance to the Astral Observatory

pickup.name: Solar Core Fragment
pickup.effect: Emits searing heat and blinding light

encounters.trigger: Absorbing the Void Stalker's essence activates the ancient lift leading to the Apex Temple

pickup.name: Chronos Key
pickup.effect: Freezes time for 3 seconds

encounters.trigger: Clearing the Nebula Wraith stabilizes the portal bridge directly to the boss chamber

boss.name: Architect of Silence
boss.victory_condition: Use the Chronos Key to stop the Architect's self-destruct sequence

level.objective: Restore the core crystal at the heart of the Floating Spire
level.reward: The ability to manipulate stellar matter
